title: Move The Tipper From Home To Ready And Place It In AUTO Mode
summary: Advance the tipper from the homed state to ready and place it in AUTO mode so it waits for WCS instructions.
when_to_use: Use after the tipper has been homed and the operator station is being placed into its documented ready operating state. This procedure is used to move the motor from home to ready, place the tipper in AUTO mode, and confirm the tipper is waiting for WCS instructions.
not_for: Recovery when the motor does not move to ready
Recovery when AUTO mode cannot be established

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the operator station actions to move the tipper from home to ready, place it in AUTO mode, and verify it is waiting for WCS instructions.

safety_notes: Use only the documented operator station controls and HMI actions supported by the source.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps if the motor does not move to ready or if AUTO mode cannot be established.
Do not infer WCS communication troubleshooting from this section.
access_or_tools_needed: Operator station controls or HMI with CYCLE START
Ability to place the tipper in AUTO mode

access_required: Access to the operator station controls or HMI
system_preconditions: Tipper is in the homed state before pressing CYCLE START

visual_references.description: Operator station control panel showing AUTO, CYCLE START, CYCLE STOP, and related controls on the Visu_MCP_Dual screen.
System screen artifact associated with startup context including CYCLE START, move from home to ready, and placing the tipper in AUTO mode.
Operator station context showing AUTO and CYCLE START controls in nearby manual-supported operator actions.
Operator station HMI screen artifact showing the Visu_Dual_MCP context referenced elsewhere in the manual.
Operator station HMI artifact associated with the Visu_Dual_MCP screen context.

steps.title: Press CYCLE START
steps.purpose: Initiate the transition from the homed state toward the ready state.
steps.instruction: At the operator station, press CYCLE START.
steps.expected_result: The startup sequence begins and the tipper motor proceeds from home toward ready.
steps.healthy_condition: CYCLE START is accepted and the tipper begins the documented move from home to ready.
steps.failure_condition: CYCLE START does not initiate the expected transition or no movement toward ready is observed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the CYCLE START control on the operator station control panel.
Startup-related system screen context associated with pressing CYCLE START.

stop_or_escalate_if: CYCLE START does not initiate the expected move from home to ready.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps for failure to move to ready.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press CYCLE START. The motor moves from home to ready. Place the tipper in AUTO mode. The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.
Nearby text identifies interface items including an AUTO button for automatic mode and CYCLE START and CYCLE STOP controls for automatic operation.

steps.title: Verify the motor moves from home to ready
steps.purpose: Confirm the tipper has reached the documented ready transition state after CYCLE START.
steps.instruction: Verify that the motor moves from home to ready after CYCLE START is pressed.
steps.expected_result: The motor moves from home to ready.
steps.healthy_condition: The motor is observed to have moved from home to ready.
steps.failure_condition: The motor does not move from home to ready.

actions.label: Verify ready transition
actions.exact_action: Verify the motor moves from home to ready.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Startup screen context associated with the move from home to ready.
Operator station control panel context for the ready-state transition.

stop_or_escalate_if: The motor does not move from home to ready.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps if the motor does not move to ready.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press CYCLE START. The motor moves from home to ready. Place the tipper in AUTO mode. The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.

steps.title: Place the tipper in AUTO mode
steps.purpose: Set the tipper into its automatic operating mode so it can wait for WCS instructions.
steps.instruction: Place the tipper in AUTO mode.
steps.expected_result: The tipper is in AUTO mode.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO mode is established on the operator station.

actions.label: Set AUTO mode
actions.exact_action: Place the tipper in AUTO mode.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the AUTO button on the operator station control panel.
Nearby operator station context showing AUTO as part of manual-supported operator actions.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source does not provide additional recovery steps if AUTO mode cannot be established.

steps.title: Verify the tipper waits for WCS instructions
steps.purpose: Confirm the tipper has reached the documented AUTO waiting state.
steps.instruction: Verify the tipper is waiting for the WCS to send instructions.
steps.expected_result: The tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.
steps.healthy_condition: The tipper is in AUTO mode and waiting for WCS instructions.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper does not appear to be waiting for WCS instructions or the waiting state cannot be confirmed from the operator station.

actions.label: Verify WCS wait state
actions.exact_action: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.

success_criteria: The motor has moved from home to ready.
The tipper is in AUTO mode.
The tipper is waiting for WCS instructions.
healthy_conditions: CYCLE START is accepted at the operator station.
The motor moves from home to ready.
The tipper waits for WCS instructions.
failure_conditions: CYCLE START does not initiate the expected transition.
The motor does not move from home to ready.
The tipper does not appear to be waiting for WCS instructions.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the motor does not move from home to ready because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.
Escalate if AUTO mode cannot be established because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.
Do not perform inferred WCS communication troubleshooting from this section.
